title: Market Brief — Sunday, May 3, 2026
summary: Compute is tightening fast. GB200 availability sits at a severe-shortage 10%, B200 at a scarce 25%, H200 at 45%, H100 at 70%, A100 at 85% oversupply, and MI300X at 60%. B200 utilization surged 34.5pp in 30 days to 91.6%, while H100 hit 99.6% — the spot-to-OCPI premium gap on H100 ($2.00 spot vs $2.34 OCPI) signals real demand is outrunning listed prices.
paragraphs: Compute is tightening fast. GB200 availability sits at a severe-shortage 10%, B200 at a scarce 25%, H200 at 45%, H100 at 70%, A100 at 85% oversupply, and MI300X at 60%. B200 utilization surged 34.5pp in 30 days to 91.6%, while H100 hit 99.6% — the spot-to-OCPI premium gap on H100 ($2.00 spot vs $2.34 OCPI) signals real demand is outrunning listed prices.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B inference runs roughly $9.48/M on A100, $9.84/M on H100, and $5.03/M on B200. Anyone selling medium-tier tokens at $3/M on older GPUs is burning cash — DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output and Meta Llama 4 Maverick at $0.60/M are selling at losses of $4-9/M per token on non-B200 hardware. Provider grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash, Meta Burning Cash.

B200 capacity is undervalued — at $4.20/hr spot with 91% utilization and the only GPU generating positive margins at medium-tier pricing, locking B200 allocations now is the clearest trade on the board. H100 at 99.6% utilization and $2.34 OCPI is overvalued for new inference workloads given its negative margins below premium tier — rotate to B200 or wait for GB200 supply to materialize.
bullets: 25% B200 availability qualifies as scarce compute, with utilization rocketing from 57% to 92% in one month.
10% GB200 availability signals severe shortage with no reliable spot pricing yet established.
$0.378/M output makes DeepSeek V3.2 the cheapest model tracked, roughly 211x cheaper than o3 Pro.
99.6% H100 utilization is effectively sold out, up 10.4pp in 30 days.
$5.03/M TCO-adjusted cost on B200 is 47% cheaper than H100 for Llama 70B inference.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means API pricing has fallen roughly 79% from the GPT-4 launch baseline of 100.
